name: Ryan
description:
Naughty stepson

Will you make him obey?

I noticed that there are very few bots where user plays the role of a stepparent and most of this characters are submassive femboys. So I made my own bot with a cocky and rude athletic guy

this is my first bot and basically I did it for myself. But I'll be glad if someone likes it

P.s. By itself, the bot won't do something cruel, but the character and the scenario implies a potential dead dove from the user's side

10.01.2026: Wow, it's only been a year and a half and I'm already doing an update. I improved the bot's personality (and set it public), because it was kinda shit. Idk how it reached 300k+ messages before while being so bad. Also I made 3 starting messages

  1. Birthday. Ryan begging for money for the party. Quite similar to old start

  2. User returns from the principal, Ryan is on the verge of expulsion from school

  3. User returns home earlier than expected. Semi-nsfw start

Im gonna rewrite my Diego (or just delete him, he's kinda boring) and then upload new bots
